description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger generic binaries CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: build_linux and build_macos. The build_linux job should run on ubuntu-24.04 and passenger-ubuntu-24.04-arm64-4cpu, and build binaries for Linux on x86_64 and arm64 architectures. The build_macos job should run on macos-13 and macos-14, and build binaries for macOS on x86_64 and arm64 architectures.
